product_overview: ToyScout is a single-page Amazon affiliate storefront that helps users discover trending toys, browse curated categories, and read related blog content. It also includes lightweight contact and newsletter forms plus static legal pages.
core_goals: Browse curated toy recommendations from the home page
Explore toy categories and inspect product details
Open Amazon affiliate product links for selected items
Read blog articles related to toy shopping and discovery
Submit a newsletter email for a local confirmation
Send a contact message and receive a local confirmation
View privacy, terms, and affiliate disclosure information

features.name: Home page browsing
features.description: Users can land on the home page and explore the main curated shopping experience, including featured products, categories, process content, blog teasers, and footer content.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See the hero section, trust strip, featured products, categories, and supporting content -> Scroll through the page sections -> Reach the footer content

features.name: Client-side navigation
features.description: Users can switch between the main views using in-app navigation, with overlays opening for Shop, Blog, Contact, and legal pages, and return to the home view when finished.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open the Shop view -> Return to the home view
Navigate to / -> Open the Blog view -> Return to the home view
Navigate to / -> Open the Contact view -> Return to the home view
Navigate to / -> Open a legal page from the footer -> Return to the home view

features.name: Shop category browsing
features.description: Users can open the shop view, choose a category, and browse the products available within that category.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open the Shop view -> Select a category -> See the products for that category
Navigate to / -> Open the Shop view -> Select a category -> Select a product -> See the product detail view

features.name: Product detail and Amazon affiliate link
features.description: Users can review product information such as title, price, rating, reviews, bullets, and image, then follow the affiliate link to Amazon when available.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open the Shop view -> Select a category -> Select a product -> See the title, price, rating, review count, bullets, and image -> Open the Amazon affiliate link
Navigate to / -> Open a featured product from the home page -> See the product detail view -> Open the Amazon affiliate link

features.name: Blog reading
features.description: Users can open the blog section, read article previews, and open full blog posts for more detail.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open the Blog view -> Select a blog card -> Read the full post -> Return to the blog list
Navigate to / -> Open the Blog view -> Select a blog card -> Read the full post -> Return to the home view

features.name: Newsletter signup
features.description: Users can enter an email address in the newsletter form and submit it to receive an on-page success confirmation.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Enter an email address in the newsletter form -> Submit the form -> See the success confirmation message

features.name: Contact form
features.description: Users can open the contact view, provide contact details and a message, and submit the form to receive an on-page thank-you confirmation.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open the Contact view -> Enter a name, email address, and message -> Submit the form -> See the thank-you confirmation message

features.name: Legal pages
features.description: Users can open static privacy, terms, and affiliate disclosure pages from the footer and read the provided policy content.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open the Privacy Policy page from the footer -> Read the policy content -> Return to the home view
Navigate to / -> Open the Terms of Service page from the footer -> Read the terms content -> Return to the home view
Navigate to / -> Open the Affiliate Disclosure page from the footer -> Read the disclosure content -> Return to the home view

tech_stack: React 18 (loaded from unpkg CDN at runtime)
Design Canvas (.dc.html) single-file document format with custom DCLogic runtime (support.js)
Inline CSS styles with Nunito font

routes.description: Single-page app. All navigation is client-side state (state.page), no URL routing. Views are home, shop, product, blog, post1, post2, post3, contact, privacy, terms, disclosure rendered as fixed overlays.

features.name: Home page rendering
features.description: Landing page with NAV, HERO, trust strip, Top Picks product grid, category grid, Scout Process section, blog teasers, newsletter and footer sections
user_interactions: Page loads and renders hero headline and hero image
Scroll through Top Picks, Categories, Scout Process, Blog and Footer sections

features.name: Client-side navigation
features.description: Nav bar links and buttons switch views by flipping state.page via openPage(), openCat(), openProduct(), goHome(). Sub-pages are position-fixed overlays.
user_interactions: Click nav links (Shop, Blog, Contact) to open the corresponding overlay view
Click logo or Home controls to return to home view
Click back controls inside sub-pages

features.name: Shop / category browsing
features.description: Shop view lists 19 Amazon Toys & Games categories from catList(). Selecting a category shows its products via productsFor(catId) — real scraped products where products/<slug>/links.txt exists, otherwise hard-coded placeholder demo products.
user_interactions: Open Shop view
Click a category card to see its product list
Click a product card to open the product detail view

features.name: Product detail with Amazon affiliate CTA
features.description: Product view shows title, price, rating, review count, bullets and image. "View on Amazon" CTA binds to the product url (real affiliate link with Associates tag, or "#" for placeholder products).
user_interactions: Open a product from a category or Top Picks
Verify title, price, rating and image are displayed
Click "View on Amazon" (opens external amazon.com affiliate link)

features.name: Blog section and posts
features.description: Blog view lists three articles; each opens a dedicated post view (post1-post3) with static content
user_interactions: Open Blog view
Click a blog card to read the full post
Navigate back to blog list or home

features.name: Newsletter signup form
features.description: Email input plus subscribe button in the footer area. No backend — submitting only flips a local state flag that shows a success message.
user_interactions: Type an email address into the newsletter input
Click subscribe button
See local success confirmation message

features.name: Contact form
features.description: Contact view with name/email/message fields. No backend — submit flips a local state flag showing a thank-you message.
user_interactions: Open Contact view
Fill name, email and message fields
Click send and see the local thank-you confirmation

features.name: Legal pages
features.description: Privacy Policy, Terms of Service and Affiliate Disclosure static overlay pages reachable from the footer
user_interactions: Click footer links to open Privacy, Terms or Disclosure pages
Read static legal content and navigate back

known_limitations.issue: No URL routing — all views share the URL "/" and are driven by client state, so deep links, browser back/forward and page refresh on a sub-page do not work
known_limitations.impact: Refreshing always returns to home; back button exits the site instead of the previous view

known_limitations.issue: Newsletter and contact forms have no backend
known_limitations.impact: Submissions only flip local state flags; no data is sent or persisted

known_limitations.issue: Runtime depends on unpkg CDN for React 18, ReactDOM and Babel standalone
known_limitations.impact: Site renders a blank page without internet access or if unpkg is unreachable

known_limitations.issue: Categories without scraped data fall back to placeholder demo products whose "View on Amazon" links are "#"
known_limitations.impact: Some product CTAs do not lead to Amazon
